thesis: AFTER-HOURS window (~17:00 ET Monday 7/20, generated 2026-07-20T20:48:20Z, deterministic snapshot still flags marketClosed=false / window pre-close, so values are LIVE INTRADAY on Friday's confirmed 7/17 close — the next-trading-day plan). STRUCTURE FIRST: the extended bull is DIGESTING near all-time highs with one near-term crack testing a repair, the leadership index still without a bull-stack, the crowd rotating defensive/energy, and vol FIRMING back up into the after-hours read. Persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars is unchanged at 7 (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17; 7/17 is the last confirmed bar, today's live Monday bar has NOT settled and is not counted). WHAT CHANGED vs the pre-close read: (1) VIX firmed back to 18.65 (from the pre-close 18.02, ~flat vs Friday's 18.77 close) — the intraday relenting reversed and vol is low-but-firm again, still under the 3-point single-reference regime-change threshold. (2) MSFT 402.29 has nudged FRACTIONALLY ABOVE its 50-day for the first time this reclaim attempt — now +0.30% above (~401.1, mom5 +2.89) — but on a LIVE intraday tick, NOT a confirmed daily close, and still bear-stacked and -8.01% below its 200-day (~437.3). (3) the momentum/semis complex got HEAVIER, not lighter: SOXX rolled from Basing to Lagging (rsMom1m -13.01, rsMom 98.90 <100, 0/12 up-momentum, 1/12 above the 50-day), SPMO mom5 -3.48, VGT -2.03. WHAT DID NOT: SPY 742.09 stays bull-stacked (20>50>200) but sits -0.18% just UNDER its rising 50-day (~743.4) and -2.05% off the ATH (~757.6) — back on the line, not a held floor; QQQ 696.06 is still TANGLED and -3.13% BELOW its 50-day (~718.6, mom5 -2.20), the reclaim UNWON and drifted a touch further under. The DEFENSIVE/ENERGY rotation is CONFIRMED: this run's fresh RRG (sector read 2026-07-20T20:48:20Z) has XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.44>100, accel +2.53 board-best, rsMom 103.02 board-best, +12.89% >200d, rotation into) with real assets leading underneath (real-assets read 13:30Z: BNO 67.7 board leader, USO 62.4 / DBC 66.4 / PDBC 66.6 / DBA 65.6 all Uptrend), XLRE/XLP Leading, while XLF has rolled to Peaking (accel -1.30, out) and XLV (accel -2.34, worst) / XLI (accel -1.43) weaken. TACTICAL, last: Friday's monthly OPEX is RESOLVED — dealer gamma has RESET for the new monthly cycle, so any prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing anything off positioning, vol term structure or the Fed for overnight and the next session. Plan for the next trading day: HOLD the bull-stack but do NOT add index beta while SPY is back on its 50-day, QQQ is tangled below its own 50-day and vol has firmed; ROTATE toward the confirmed, oil-backed XLE over weakening XLV; TRIM stretched, still-heavy semis into any late/opening strength; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT as it presses its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk overnight hedge toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail after re-verifying the live path.
